name: Occupied home
description: Working around furniture, finishes, pets, and daily household activity; extra protection and cleanup.

name: Stucco exterior
description: Cutting, patching, and sealing stucco for exterior penetrations and surface-mounted equipment.

name: Two-story home
description: Extra ladder work, longer pulls, and slower access on two-story structures.

name: Attic run
description: Routing cable through an attic space: insulation, heat, and restricted movement.

name: Finished walls
description: Fishing cable through closed walls/ceilings with minimal drywall openings and patch-ready cuts.

name: Crawlspace access
description: Routing through a crawlspace: suit-up, limited clearance, slower cable runs.

name: Permit handling
description: Preparing, filing, and coordinating the electrical permit and inspection.

name: Obsolete panel brand
description: Legacy panel (Zinsco, FPE, etc.): sourcing/adapting parts and extra care on aged equipment.

name: Long run over 50 ft
description: Circuit run beyond 50 ft: additional wire, possible upsizing for voltage drop, longer pull.

name: Tight workspace
description: Constrained working clearance (closets, packed garages) slowing every task.

name: Ceiling over 10 ft
description: High-ceiling work requiring taller ladders/scaffold and slower overhead handling.

name: Trenching required
description: Excavating, bedding, and backfilling a trench for underground conduit.
